title: taraxacum pseudocalanthodium
intro: Taraxacum pseudocalanthodium, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the same family as the common dandelion. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum pseudocalanthodium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
